user_query:
Please read the podcast transcript at input/transcript.md and produce a complete content package in human hosted style. Write a single JSON file to output/episode_package.json with this exact structure and constraints:

{
  "style_mode": "human_hosted",
  "titles": ["...", "...", "...", "...", "..."],
  "show_notes": "...",
  "chapters": [
    {"time": "MM:SS", "title": "..."},
    {"time": "MM:SS", "title": "..."}
  ],
  "social": {
    "twitter_x": "...",
    "instagram_caption": "...",
    "instagram_hashtags": ["#...", "#..."]
  },
  "seo_tags": ["...", "..."]
}

Formatting rules to follow so the file can be validated by code:
- titles: exactly 5 strings; each title must be 6–10 words.
- show_notes: a single paragraph between 150 and 300 words.
- chapters: at least 5 items; each has time in MM:SS format; the first chapter time must be "00:00"; titles are non-empty. You may note they are approximate based on narrative beats.
- social.twitter_x: maximum 280 characters.
- social.instagram_caption: between 150 and 200 words (hashtags must NOT be included in this caption field).
- social.instagram_hashtags: 10–15 items; each item must start with "#" (no spaces inside an individual hashtag).
- seo_tags: 15–20 non-empty strings.
- All strings must be English.

Do not create any other files. Only write output/episode_package.json.
